changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Add recursion guard to existing module-to-legacy discrepancy-note sync function
changeSet.sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION sync_module_discrepancy_note_to_discrepancy_note() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$ BEGIN IF pg_trigger_depth() > 1 THEN IF (TG_OP = 'DELETE') THEN RETURN OLD; END IF; RETURN NEW; END IF;
IF (TG_OP = 'INSERT') THEN INSERT INTO discrepancy_note ( discrepancy_note_id, description, discrepancy_note_type_id, resolution_status_id, detailed_notes, date_created, owner_id, parent_dn_id, entity_type, study_id, assigned_user_id ) VALUES ( NEW.discrepancy_note_id, NEW.description, NEW.discrepancy_note_type_id, NEW.resolution_status_id, NEW.detailed_notes, NEW.date_created, NEW.owner_id, NEW.parent_dn_id, NEW.entity_type, NEW.study_id, NEW.assigned_user_id ) ON CONFLICT (discrepancy_note_id) DO UPDATE SET description = EXCLUDED.description, discrepancy_note_type_id = EXCLUDED.discrepancy_note_type_id, resolution_status_id = EXCLUDED.resolution_status_id, detailed_notes = EXCLUDED.detailed_notes, date_created = EXCLUDED.date_created, owner_id = EXCLUDED.owner_id, parent_dn_id = EXCLUDED.parent_dn_id, entity_type = EXCLUDED.entity_type, study_id = EXCLUDED.study_id, assigned_user_id = EXCLUDED.assigned_user_id; RETURN NEW; ELSIF (TG_OP = 'UPDATE') THEN UPDATE discrepancy_note SET description = NEW.description, discrepancy_note_type_id = NEW.discrepancy_note_type_id, resolution_status_id = NEW.resolution_status_id, detailed_notes = NEW.detailed_notes, date_created = NEW.date_created, owner_id = NEW.owner_id, parent_dn_id = NEW.parent_dn_id, entity_type = NEW.entity_type, study_id = NEW.study_id, assigned_user_id = NEW.assigned_user_id WHERE discrepancy_note_id = OLD.discrepancy_note_id; RETURN NEW; ELSIF (TG_OP = 'DELETE') THEN DELETE FROM discrepancy_note WHERE discrepancy_note_id = OLD.discrepancy_note_id; RETURN OLD; END IF; END; $$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;

changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Create legacy-to-module discrepancy-note sync function and trigger
changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sync_discrepancy_note_to_module ON discrepancy_note; DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS sync_discrepancy_note_to_module_discrepancy_note();
